risk_notes: Synthetic hook smoke test only; it validates local command classification, not every runtime tool payload shape.
setup: Run from CODEX_HOME after lightweight hook policy changes.
success_criteria: Prompt-submitted secret-like values are blocked before model dispatch
P0 workflow/harness prompts emit an L4 PM contract with English intent, goal action, delegation, watcher requirements, subagent call declaration, and anomaly calibration

P0 workflow/harness prompts persist task class, delegation authorization, goal requirement, watcher expectation, subagent decision requirement, anomaly pause expectation, and intent frame in hook state
Prompt routing persists matching skill workflow requirements and Stop requires SKILL_EVIDENCE before finalization
Workflow state defines variable categories and normalizes event/reminder lists to remove empty values, duplicates, and state bloat
PostToolUse autonomously records doctor and verify invocation evidence for control-plane edits
Stop enforces L4 anomaly, subagent, and watcher requirements even when no tool event or changed surface is recorded
Stop rejects delegated final output that omits SUBAGENT_CALL used/not_used and allows an explicit marker with reason, direct evidence, and residual risk
PM-led/team preset wording alone does not count as subagent authorization
Stop rejects final output missing SUBAGENT_CALL evidence after an actual subagent tool event
Stop rejects L4 delegated finals that mention subagent evidence but omit WATCHER_REPORT or complete WATCHER_NOT_USED
PostToolUse does not record subagent activity from read-only text mentions of WATCHER_REPORT or WATCHER_NOT_USED
Synthetic hook smoke tests restore the live hook state after probing
Staged git diff sensitive-pattern validation is allowed
Direct auth file reads remain blocked
Mixed direct protected-file reads plus staged diff scans remain blocked
The redacted staged-diff scanner is allowed
task: Verify the lightweight hook distinguishes safe staged diff validation from direct auth file reads, emits enforceable PM workflow state for P0 delegated workflow incidents, and does not leave synthetic hook state behind.
